metadata.methodology: City-level search across major Indiana metros with homepage/contact extraction

candidates.address: 950 Transport Dr., Suite B, Valparaiso, IN 46383
candidates.notes: Exclusive Epilog Laser distributor for Illinois, Indiana, Michigan and Ohio since 1997. Serves the Midwest with laser engraving/cutting and UV printing equipment.
Indianapolis custom laser engraving shop with direct email, phone, and Instagram. Strong fit for personalized products and local B2B/custom work.

Fort Wayne precision laser marking, laser engraving, micro-drilling, micro-milling, and thin metal cutting shop. Over 30 years expertise with stronger industrial positioning than gift-oriented engravers.
Self-owned and operated since 2016. Provides custom laser engraving and laser cutting for wood, plastic, glass and metal in the greater Fort Wayne area.
South Bend engraver specializing in engraved brick and stone, while also engraving wood, metal, glass, concrete, plastic, and leather. Strong direct contact information.

candidates.address: 3228 Olympia Dr. Suite D, Lafayette, IN 47909
candidates.notes: Lafayette design/print/sign shop with dedicated laser engraving and cutting page. Handles drinkware, tumblers, personalized gifts, signage, ADA Braille and related display work.
Indianapolis laser engraving shop focused on wood, glass, leather, acrylic, metal and anodized metals. Service offering is clear, but no direct email or phone was surfaced during the initial pass.

Indianapolis sign company with 20+ years in business. Provides design, manufacturing, installation, and service for custom business signage and architectural elements. Also has a laser engraving/cutting service page.
Trusted since 1958. Large Indianapolis sign manufacturer with a 45,000 sq ft facility, custom design, project management, onsite production, and installation.

Full-service custom fabrication sign company in Indianapolis offering design, fabrication, installation, maintenance and repair. Website is active and business appears real, but direct contact details were not surfaced cleanly from the homepage fetch.

candidates.address: St. Joseph County / South Bend, IN
candidates.notes: Serving St. Joe County since 1990. Offers engraved signs, ADA-compliant signs, wall plaques, wraps, banners, wide-format digital printing and trade show displays.
Evansville sign manufacturer creating commercial digital signage, monument and pole signs, LED channel letters, awnings and related custom fabrication. Free estimates highlighted.
Architectural signage and wayfinding specialist in Evansville. Strong design-led positioning with direct email, LinkedIn and Instagram present.
Bloomington-area sign and awning shop covering vehicle graphics, wraps, sign and awning fabrication, install, repair and crane service. Direct Gmail contact found in page source.
Full-service Lafayette sign shop and auto art business with 40+ years in market. Handles board signs, sandblasted cedar signs, hand-painted work, vinyl, vehicle graphics, decals and more.
